title: LOWER COLUMBIA Q CENTER - 211info
text: LOWER COLUMBIA Q CENTER LOWER COLUMBIA Q CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources and support services to the LGBTQ2SIA+ community and allies of the Lower Columbia region. Services include a community center, education opportunities, mentorship, and monthly support groups for adults, youth, and families. Limited financial assistance is available as funds allow for gender-affirming costs, name changes, hormone treatments, and other expenses approved on a case-by-case basis. Financial assistance is limited to once per year, with a $200 limit. 171 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Community Center walk in hours: Tuesday 2pm-5pm, Thursday noon-4pm. Other hours vary by service. Email (503) 468-5155 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 468-5155 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. To request financial assistance or specific services, fill out form on website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County SITE HOURS: Tuesday 2pm-5pm, Thursday noon-4pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Support Groups * LGBTQ2+ Individuals General Clothing Provision * LGBTQ2+ Individuals LGBTQ2+ Community Centers LGBTQ2+ Support Groups Mentoring Programs * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Personal/Grooming Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Specialized Information and Referral * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Transgender Hormone Therapy Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * LGBTQ2+ Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
